tool_args.label: Y Properties Holdings II, LLC
Tibbets Brook Daylighting Project

payload.description: NYC DEP project to install a combination of open channel and closed conduit to transport and redirect the base water flow from Tibbetts Brook out of the Broadway sewer across a 1.56-mile span between Van Cortlandt Lake and the Harlem River, within MNR's BN Yard

tool_args.label: Penn Station Access Project

payload.description: New MNR link to Penn Station providing one-seat passenger rail service for MNR's New Haven Line customers, running through the Bronx via Amtrak's Hell Gate Line, entering Queens via the Hell Gate Bridge, connecting to the LIRR Mainline at Harold Interlocking to access Penn Station, including construction of four new MNR stations and two new substations in the Bronx

tool_args.label: Tibbets Brook NYC DEP rail infrastructure upgrades

payload.claim_text: As part of the project, NYC DEP will provide BN Yard with major rail infrastructure upgrades including track replacement, grade improvements, switch relocations, and stormwater improvements

tool_args.label: Hungry Angels location next to 18th Avenue subway station

payload.claim_text: The Premises was previously occupied by Deck 18-6309 LLC which operated as a Dunkin' Donuts until they vacated the space. The Premises is considered a 'City Account' space pursuant to the 1953 Master Lease with the City of New York
